creator: ade@lovett.com
text:
Huge GNOME update, in line with the GNOME October release (1.0.53)

	16 updates to the GNOME meta-port:
		libxml, gnomelibs, libglade, gnomeobjc, gnomeprint,
		gnomecore, gnomemedia, gnomepim, gnomegames,
		electriceyes, gnumeric, gnomeutils, ggv, gnomeadmin,
		gnomecontrolcenter, gtop, gnomemc, gnome

	6 updates to GNOME-related ports:
		glade, gwp, gtk--, gnomeusersguide, py-gtk, py-gnome

	3 new GNOME-related ports:
		gdk-pixbuf, eog, bonobo

Fix: 

Grab the tarball at:
		http://www.lovett.com/FreeBSD/gnome-october.tar.gz

	Note:  you absolutely, definitely, postively need the
	       following other updates before attempting to build
	       this stuff -- the PRs have already been committed.

	glib-1.2.6, gtk-1.2.6, imlib-1.9.7, libaudiofile-0.1.9,
	esound-0.2.15, ORBit-0.5.0

	and, most importantly of all, libtool-1.3.3

	Note:  I've only built this stuff on 3.3-STABLE.  My other
	       testbox is offline at the moment until -CURRENT
	       calms down a little.  At least the signal changes
	       will probably require further patches later on.
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
